docs.title: LaTeX Writing Repo

docs.text: Use in a Codespace Visit https://github.com/earthroverprogram/bragi . Create your own repo based on this template. Name your repo and set the visibility you want. Open the repo in a Codespace. Open and build dummy_report.tex . Use the commands provided by LaTeX Workshop.
